title: Realism
description: Improve and give Minecraft a fresh overhaul of its graphical and physical gameplay
body: This modpack is used as a way to make graphical and physical improvements to your gameplay and diverisfy client and server sided mods to replicate the best outcome avaliable for now, only on 1.21 and is a way to bring realism and shaders into your game with the best pack of sound qualities, better 1st and 3rd person and backpacks which can be used for better storage as you and your friends explore minecraft with a newfound love for the game, (in my opinion, its the best way to spend your 2 week minecraft phase)!<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8ymyx_W50hc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
